title: Cyclo Intelligence: Physical AI Workflow System for ROBOTIS Robots
summary: Cyclo Intelligence is a Physical AI workflow system from ROBOTIS providing a web interface for dataset collection, management, conversion to LeRobot format, and trained-model deployment. It has two components: Cyclo Data for the dataset pipeline and Cyclo Brain for policy runtime and robot inference. Policy backends include LeRobot models (ACT, SmolVLA, XVLA, Pi0, Pi0.5, Diffusion) and NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1.7, and it works with ROBOTIS OMY, OMX, AI Worker, and other ROS 2-enabled robots.
